title: vulpia exserta
intro: Vulpia exserta, also known as slender hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Vulpia exserta is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
